# Saad Rafiq

> Software engineer specializing in robotics, machine learning, and full-stack development. Dual B.S. in Computer Science and Applied Mathematics from Texas State University; M.S. in Computer Science at Georgia Tech (in progress). Currently a Software Engineer at Dell Technologies. Published in IEEE; featured in a Dell Technologies white paper.

Saad builds at the intersection of hardware and software — autonomous firefighting drones, stair-climbing rescue robots, ML-based computer vision systems, and production CI/CD pipelines. He is open to new opportunities in software engineering, robotics, and ML.

Contact: saadarafiq@gmail.com

## Experience

- [Dell Technologies — Software Engineer (Feb 2025–Present)](https://srblank.github.io/rafiqsaad/#/): CI/CD pipelines for Dell Lightning storage, Nvidia DOCA OFED driver automation, performance testing in Python and Bash.
- [Dell Technologies — Software Engineering Intern (May–Aug 2024)](https://srblank.github.io/rafiqsaad/#/): Python SDK for AWS, Azure, and GCP targeting Dell APEX Protection Storage.
- [HiPE Lab — Undergraduate Researcher (Jan 2023–Aug 2024)](https://srblank.github.io/rafiqsaad/#/): Three autonomous firefighting drones with SLAM, obstacle avoidance, thermal imaging, and a React/Express/MongoDB UI.
- [HiPE Lab — Software Engineer Intern (Jun 2022–May 2023)](https://srblank.github.io/rafiqsaad/#/): Stair-climbing rescue robot with ROS2, Nvidia Jetson Nano, deep learning-based people and scream detection. Published in IEEE 2024.
- [IOR Research Team — ML Researcher (Aug 2021–May 2023)](https://srblank.github.io/rafiqsaad/#/): RPCA and k-means motion detection algorithm implemented in MATLAB.

## Projects

- [ShellSweeper](https://github.com/SrBlank/shellsweeper): Terminal Minesweeper in Python using curses, distributed via a GitHub-hosted APT repository.
- [WallpaperGen](https://github.com/SrBlank/WallpaperGen): Automated desktop wallpaper generator compositing astronomical visuals and weather data using Python and systemd.
- [SLAM Person Mapping](https://github.com/SrBlank/SLAM-Person-Mapping): Real-time indoor human detection and mapping combining MobileNet-SSD with Hector SLAM over ROS2.
- [Black Scholes Methods](https://github.com/SrBlank/Black-Scholes-Methods): Comparative analysis of Binomial Tree, Crank-Nicolson, and Runge-Kutta methods for American options pricing.
- [RPI-Alarm](https://github.com/SrBlank/RPI-Alarm): Network-based alarm system with Flask, ESP32, and HC-SR04 proximity sensor.

## Publications

- "Design of Autonomous Rover for Firefighter Rescue: Integrating Deep Learning with ROS2" — 2024 IEEE World AI IoT Congress (AIIoT), Seattle. DOI: 10.1109/AIIoT61789.2024.10578950
- "Saving lives while reducing first responder risks – with AI" — Dell Technologies White Paper, 2023.

## Skills

Python, C++, Bash, Groovy, JavaScript, TypeScript, MATLAB, React, Flask, ROS2, OpenCV, SLAM, AWS, Azure, GCP, Jenkins, Docker, PostgreSQL, Linux, Nvidia Jetson, CUDA.
